description: Online Cinema Analytics — DAU, конверсия, топ фильмов, retention cohort heatmap

targets.rawSql: SELECT metric_date AS time, metric_value AS "DAU" FROM daily_metrics WHERE metric_name = 'dau' AND metric_date >= $__timeFrom()::date AND metric_date <= $__timeTo()::date ORDER BY metric_date
SELECT AVG(metric_value) * 100 AS "Конверсия %" FROM daily_metrics WHERE metric_name = 'conversion_rate' AND metric_date >= NOW() - INTERVAL '7 days'
SELECT AVG(metric_value) / 60 AS "Минут" FROM daily_metrics WHERE metric_name = 'avg_watch_seconds' AND metric_date >= NOW() - INTERVAL '7 days'

SELECT dimension_key AS movie_id, SUM(metric_value) AS views FROM daily_metrics WHERE metric_name = 'top_movie' AND metric_date >= NOW() - INTERVAL '7 days' GROUP BY dimension_key ORDER BY views DESC LIMIT 10

panels.title: Retention Cohort Heatmap (Day 0 / D1 / D7)
panels.description: По вертикали — дата первого просмотра (когорта). По горизонтали — Day 0 / D1 / D7. В ячейках — % вернувшихся пользователей.

targets.rawSql: WITH cohorts AS (SELECT user_id, toDate(min(event_timestamp)) AS cohort_date FROM cinema.movie_events GROUP BY user_id), cohort_sizes AS (SELECT cohort_date, count() AS cohort_size FROM cohorts GROUP BY cohort_date), d1 AS (SELECT c.cohort_date, count(DISTINCT e.user_id) AS retained FROM cinema.movie_events e INNER JOIN cohorts c ON e.user_id = c.user_id WHERE toDate(e.event_timestamp) = c.cohort_date + INTERVAL 1 DAY GROUP BY c.cohort_date), d7 AS (SELECT c.cohort_date, count(DISTINCT e.user_id) AS retained FROM cinema.movie_events e INNER JOIN cohorts c ON e.user_id = c.user_id WHERE toDate(e.event_timestamp) = c.cohort_date + INTERVAL 7 DAY GROUP BY c.cohort_date) SELECT cs.cohort_date AS "Когорта", cs.cohort_size AS "Day 0 (размер)", 100.0 AS "Day 0 %", round(coalesce(d1.retained, 0) * 100.0 / cs.cohort_size, 1) AS "Day 1 %", round(coalesce(d7.retained, 0) * 100.0 / cs.cohort_size, 1) AS "Day 7 %" FROM cohort_sizes cs LEFT JOIN d1 ON cs.cohort_date = d1.cohort_date LEFT JOIN d7 ON cs.cohort_date = d7.cohort_date ORDER BY cs.cohort_date DESC LIMIT 30

SELECT metric_date AS time, CASE WHEN dimension_key = 'd1' THEN metric_value * 100 END AS "Retention D1 %", CASE WHEN dimension_key = 'd7' THEN metric_value * 100 END AS "Retention D7 %" FROM daily_metrics WHERE metric_name = 'retention_rate' AND metric_date >= $__timeFrom()::date ORDER BY metric_date

title: Cinema Analytics
